display.purpose: Hero headlines and major section anchors. One per major scroll section.

headline.purpose: Section headings, case study titles, service names.

title.purpose: Card headings, feature labels, sub-section titles.

label.purpose: Tech stack tags, system identifiers, process step codes, nav secondary labels. Always JetBrains Mono, uppercase.

shadows.name: cyan-ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Card hover, button hover, active nav items. Glow toward user — not lift.

shadows.name: cyan-focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus rings on all interactive elements. WCAG AAA. Never thinner.

shadows.name: violet-ambient-hero
shadows.purpose: Hero orb and ambient background elements only. Never on UI components.

shadows.name: coral-error-glow
shadows.purpose: Error state emphasis on form fields with Alert Coral border.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for all UI state transitions — hover, focus, active.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Entrance animations — elements arriving into viewport.

motion.name: ease-in-out-cubic
motion.purpose: Continuous loops — shimmer, float, gradient-shift. Not for one-shot transitions.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Card entrances, section reveals, focus transitions.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Page-level entrance animations, hero word reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Charged Cyan fill on Near Void text. Used once per viewport section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #00E5FF; color: #080A0F; padding: 14px 32px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FFFFFF; color: #080A0F; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #33ecff; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #1E2533; color: #6B7A99; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent with Structural Line border. Used for nav actions and secondary choices.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #E8EDF5; padding: 13px 31px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: 1px solid #1E2533; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #141820; color: #00E5FF; border-color: #00E5FF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: #1E2533; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Standard content card. Lifted Slate background, 1px Structural Line border. Glows on hover when interactive.
components.html:
POS SYSTEM

Retail Point of Sale

End-to-end sales and inventory management built for multi-branch retail.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #141820; border: 1px solid #1E2533; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.15); border-color: rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.25); } .ds-card-label { display: block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B7A99; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #E8EDF5; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 10px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #6B7A99; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; }

components.name: Tech Chip
components.description: Technology stack tag and filter chip. Mono font, pill shape. Active state fills with Charged Cyan.
components.css: .ds-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #1E2533; color: #6B7A99; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); cursor: default; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #2b3445; color: #E8EDF5; } .ds-chip--active { background: #00E5FF; color: #080A0F; border-color: #00E5FF; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text field. Deep Slate background, Structural Line border. Cyan border + focus ring on focus. Error state uses Alert Coral.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B7A99; } .ds-input { background: #0E1118; border: 1px solid #1E2533; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #E8EDF5; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7A99; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #00E5FF; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.2); } .ds-input--error { border-color: #FF4D6A; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(255, 77, 106, 0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #080A0F; color: #6B7A99; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation. Near Void background, Structural Line bottom border. Logo + anchor links + primary CTA.
components.html:
CWDevs
ServicesWorkProcessAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 48px; height: 68px; background: #080A0F; border-bottom: 1px solid #1E2533; } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-logo-cw { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #00E5FF; } .ds-nav-logo-devs { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #E8EDF5; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.active { color: #00E5FF; } .ds-nav-cta { padding: 10px 24px; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Floating System Card
components.description: Hero section deliverable cards. Parallax-driven. Represents client system outputs — the first proof point of real work.
components.html:
ERP MODULE
Inventory Control
Live in production
components.css: .ds-float-card { background: #141820; border: 1px solid #1E2533; border-radius: 8px; padding: 18px 20px; min-width: 180px; max-width: 220px; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-float-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.15); border-color: rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.3); } .ds-float-card-type { display: block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B7A99; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-float-card-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #E8EDF5; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-float-card-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-float-card-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #00E5FF; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.6); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-float-card-status { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #6B7A99; }

narrative.overview:
CW Devs is a digital systems engineering firm — and the design system is the proof. Every surface conveys engineered exactness: tight spacing, high-contrast type, restrained color use that makes the accent matter. Nothing is soft. Nothing is accidental. The system is dark by necessity — the audience is evaluating capability on a screen, often after hours, making a real business decision. The darkness creates focus; the cyan accent creates conviction.

This is not a design system that decorates. It does not reach for warmth or approachability. It reaches for credibility. SME founders and decision-makers arrive skeptical. They want to see that CW Devs has done the hard work before they hire them. The precision of the interface is the first proof point. A misaligned margin is a credibility risk. A weak CTA is a lost client.

The system explicitly rejects: sloppy spacing, soft neutrals, passive copy, generically modern layouts, motion that runs for its own sake, gradient text as decoration, side-stripe border accents, and anything that reads as uncertain of itself.
keyCharacteristics: Near-void dark backgrounds with controlled surface layering
Single charged-cyan accent used sparingly — its rarity is the point
Space Grotesk display type with aggressive negative tracking
JetBrains Mono for all technical labels, codes, and tags
Glow-based depth: flat at rest, illuminated on interaction
Motion serves the argument — not the animator's ego
WCAG AAA contrast throughout; reduced motion respected system-wide

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Charged Cyan is the only accent on a given screen at rest. Deep Signal Violet appears only inside gradients with Cyan — never solo. Alert Coral is a warning system, not a brand color. One voice. One direction.

rules.name: The No Decorative Gradient Rule
rules.body: background-clip: text with any gradient is prohibited. Gradient text is decorative, never meaningful. Use Charged Cyan solid for emphasis; use weight and scale for hierarchy.

rules.name: The Territory Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk owns headings. DM Sans owns body. JetBrains Mono owns anything with a technical designation. No font crosses into another's territory.

rules.name: The Tight Crown Rule
rules.body: Display and Headline type always tracks negative. Loose tracking on large type reads as uncertain. At display scale, -0.02em is the minimum commitment.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface carries a shadow at rest. Hover glows and focus rings are state — not decoration. A glowing card that isn't interactive is a lie.

rules.name: The Single Source Rule
rules.body: Glow color matches the accent that the element is affiliated with. A cyan CTA glows cyan. A destructive action glows coral. No element glows with a color it doesn't contain.

dos: Do use Charged Cyan for one primary CTA per viewport — its scarcity is its power.
Do use JetBrains Mono for every technical label, system name, stack identifier, and process code.
Do track display and headline type negatively: -0.02em on Display, -0.015em on Headline.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Every GSAP and Framer Motion animation must check the media query.
Do maintain 7:1 contrast for body text and 4.5:1 for large text (WCAG AAA).
Do use tonal steps (Near Void → Deep Slate → Lifted Slate) to create depth.
Do use focus rings on every interactive element: 4px Cyan pulse ring, offset 2px.
Do keep motion purposeful — it must direct attention, reveal structure, or build confidence.
donts: Don't use background-clip: text with gradients — gradient text is prohibited.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent.
Don't be sloppy — misaligned elements and inconsistent padding are credibility failures.
Don't be weak — soft palettes, passive copy, and excessive whitespace without tension read as uncertainty.
Don't use generic dev agency clichés: rocket emojis, 'let's build something amazing together,' identical icon-grid service cards.
Don't animate for its own sake — motion that doesn't serve the visitor's decision is decorative.
Don't use enterprise gray — cold corporate neutrals with no edge or conviction.
Don't use Alert Coral for anything except errors, destructive actions, and high-urgency states.
Don't use Deep Signal Violet as a standalone fill — gradients with Cyan only.
Don't nest cards — restructure with sections or lists.
Don't use placeholder text as a field label.
Don't introduce a fourth typeface — the three-font system covers every territory.
